changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Ajouter les tests Macroscopie - * - Leucorrhées aux panels ECB-COL / ECB-VULVE / ECB-MUQUEUSE
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON (p.name = 'ECB-COL' AND t.name = 'Macroscopie - Col - Leucorrhées') OR (p.name = 'ECB-VULVE' AND t.name = 'Macroscopie - Vulve - Leucorrhées') OR (p.name = 'ECB-MUQUEUSE' AND t.name = 'Macroscopie - Muqueuse vaginale - Leucorrhées') WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );
